title: This Ex-Quant Had to Quit Wall Street to Build a 24/7 Stock Exchange | QFEX, Annanay Kapila
summary: Annanay Kapila, a former quantitative trader at a top hedge fund managing $10 billion daily, left Wall Street to build QFEX, a 24/7 global stock exchange. He argues that high-frequency trading adds no value and extracts wealth through structural market flaws, while criticizing the financial sector for trapping talented mathematicians with golden handcuffs.
